meta.mandate: Demonstrate fail-closed issuer-exposure triage with a synthetic security fixture.
meta.universe: Synthetic DEMO exchange only; no real security is evaluated.
meta.geography: Australia and United States methodology references
meta.source_posture: Opened official public sources plus one explicitly synthetic scenario locator.
meta.financial_boundary: Research prioritization only; not investment advice, a trade recommendation, or an expected-return forecast.
assumptions: All issuer, ticker, exchange and exposure fields for XGS are synthetic test data.
The example must remain SCREEN_FLAG until a real filing and quantified exposure exist.

sources.title: ASIC INFO 269: Discussing financial products and services online
Investor.gov Social Media and Stock Tip Scams

claims.statement: ASIC explains that online discussion of financial products can amount to financial product advice or other regulated financial services depending on the content and circumstances.
SEC EDGAR is an official source for searching public-company filings.
Investor.gov identifies guaranteed-return pitches and social-media stock tips as fraud warning signs.
XGS may supply grid equipment, but the scenario contains no real filing, segment denominator or commercial-capture evidence.
The candidate must remain a screen flag until issuer identity and exposure are supported by opened primary or first-party disclosure.

candidates.beneficiary_path: Synthetic theme → hypothetical grid equipment → unverified XGS exposure
candidates.why_not_stronger: No real security identity, filing, exposure denominator, financial-capture signal, current valuation or confirmed catalyst exists.
candidates.first_rejection: Reject if no listed issuer or filing-backed material exposure can be identified.
falsifiers: The issuer does not exist on the stated exchange.
A real filing shows the relevant exposure is immaterial.

assumptions.statement: A real listed issuer may have material, measurable exposure to the commercial driver.

diligence.critical_claim: Resolve a real issuer/security and quantify segment or product exposure.
diligence.required_source_category: exchange identity plus latest company filing
diligence.method: Search the relevant exchange and issuer filing system; capture issuer, ticker, share class, product/segment, period and denominator.
diligence.metric_period_denominator: Exposure metric divided by issuer segment or group denominator for the latest reported period.
diligence.pass_threshold: Real security identity plus at least one opened filing and one quantified exposure metric.
diligence.fail_threshold: No matching listed security or filing shows immaterial/no exposure.
diligence.inconclusive_branch: Do not upgrade; narrow the value-chain search once, then stop at the source/time cap.
diligence.time_data_cap: 60 minutes; public sources only; no paid-data export.
diligence.mnpi_license_boundary: Stop on suspected MNPI, unauthorized account access or redistribution restrictions.

decision.reason: The synthetic scenario is a lead only and contains no real issuer-exposure proof.
decision.why_not_stronger: The commercial-to-security chain breaks before identity and exposure attribution.
evidence_that_changes_rank: A real exchange identity record and opened company filing quantify material exposure.
A filing disproves or shows immaterial exposure, which triggers REJECT.
decision.next_diligence_workflow: Run D001 identity and exposure attribution only; do not perform or recommend a trade.
